H5800.strongs_def: to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc.
H5800.kjv_def: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, [idiom] surely.
H5800.usage: forsake(129x), leave(72x), faileth(2x), fortify(2x), help(2x), committeth(1x), destitute(1x), refuseth(1x), surely(1x)

H5801.derivation: from H5800 (עָזַב) in the sense of letting go (for a price, i.e. selling);
H5801.strongs_def: trade, i.e. the place (mart) or the payment (revenue)

H5802.derivation: from H5794 (עַז) and the root of H950 (בּוּקָה); stern depopulator;

H5803.derivation: from H5794 (עַז) and H1409 (גָּד); stern troop;

H5806.strongs_def: Azubah, the name of two Israelitesses

H5808.strongs_def: forcible; collectively and concretely, an army

H5809.strongs_def: Azzur, the name of three Israelites

H5810.kjv_def: harden, impudent, prevail, strengthen (self), be strong.

H5812.derivation: from H5810 (עָזַז) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has strengthened;
H5812.strongs_def: Azazjah, the name of three Israelites

H5813.strongs_def: Uzzi, the name of six Israelites

H5815.derivation: from H5756 (עוּז) and H410 (אֵל); strengthened of God;

H5816.derivation: from H5797 (עֹז) and H410 (אֵל); strength of God;
H5816.strongs_def: Uzziel, the name of six Israelites

H5817.strongs_def: an Uzzielite (collectively) or descendants of Uzziel

H5818.derivation: or עֻזִּיָּהוּ; from H5797 (עֹז) and H3050 (יָהּ); strength of Jah;
H5818.strongs_def: Uzzijah, the name of five Israelites

H5820.derivation: from H5794 (עַז) and H4194 (מָוֶת); strong one of death;
H5820.strongs_def: Azmaveth, the name of three Israelites and of a place in Palestine
H5820.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5824.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5823 (עָזַק);

H5826.strongs_def: to surround, i.e. protect or aid

H5827.strongs_def: Ezer, the name of two Israelites

H5829.strongs_def: Ezer, the name of four Israelites

H5832.derivation: from H5826 (עָזַר) and H410 (אֵל); God has helped;
H5832.strongs_def: Azarel, the name of five Israelites

H5833.derivation: or עֶזְרָת; (Psalm 60:11 (13); Psalm 108:12 (13)), feminine of H5828 (עֵזֶר);

H5835.derivation: from H5826 (עָזַר) in its original meaning of surrounding;

H5837.derivation: from H5828 (עֵזֶר) and H410 (אֵל); help of God;
H5837.strongs_def: Azriel, the name of three Israelites

H5838.derivation: or עֲזַרְיָהוּ; from H5826 (עָזַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has helped;
H5838.strongs_def: Azarjah, the name of nineteen Israelites

H5840.derivation: from H5828 (עֵזֶר) and active participle of H6965 (קוּם); help of an enemy;
H5840.strongs_def: Azrikam, the name of four Israelites

H5841.strongs_def: an Azzathite or inhabitant of Azzah

H5842.derivation: from H5860 (עִיט) (contracted) in the sense of swooping, i.e. side-long stroke;

H5844.strongs_def: to wrap, i.e. cover, veil, cloth, or roll
H5844.kjv_def: array self, be clad, (put a) cover (-ing, self), fill, put on, [idiom] surely, turn aside.
H5844.usage: cover(10x), array(1x), clad(1x), covering(1x), filleth(1x), surely(1x)

H5845.derivation: from an unused root meaning apparently to contain;
H5845.strongs_def: a receptacle (for milk, i.e. pail; figuratively, breast)

H5846.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sneeze;

H5848.strongs_def: to shroud, i.e. clothe (whether transitive or reflex.); hence (from the idea of darkness) to languish
H5848.kjv_def: cover (over), fail, faint, feebler, hide self, be overwhelmed, swoon.
H5848.usage: overwhelmed(5x), faint(3x), swoon(2x), covereth(1x), fail(1x), feeble(1x), feebler(1x), hideth(1x)

H5849.strongs_def: to encircle (for attack or protection); especially to crown (literally or figuratively)

H5852.strongs_def: Ataroth, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine

H5853.derivation: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and H146 (אַדָּר); crowns of Addar;

H5854.derivation: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and H1004 (בַּיִת) and H3097 (יוֹאָב); crowns of the house of Joab;

H5855.derivation: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and a name otherwise unused (being from the same as H8226 (שָׂפַן)) meaning hidden; crowns of Shophan;

H5857.derivation: or (feminine) עַיָּא; (Nehemiah 11:31), or עַיָּת; (Isaiah 10:28), for H5856 (עִי);
H5857.strongs_def: Ai, Aja or Ajath, a place in Palestine

H5858.derivation: perhaps from an unused root probably meaning to be bald; bare;
H5858.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5860.strongs_def: to swoop down upon (literally or figuratively)

H5861.strongs_def: a hawk or other bird of prey

H5863.derivation: from the plural of H5856 (עִי) and the plural of the active participle of H5674 (עָבַר) with the article interposed; ruins of the passers;

H5864.strongs_def: Ijim, a place in the Desert.

H5865.strongs_def: {concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always}

H5867.derivation: or עוֹלָם; (Ezra 10:2; Jeremiah 49:36), probably from H5956 (עָלַם); hidden, i.e. distant;
H5867.strongs_def: Elam, a son of Shem and his descendants, with their country; also of six Israelites
H5867.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5869.strongs_def: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
H5869.kjv_def: affliction, outward appearance, [phrase] before, [phrase] think best, colour, conceit, [phrase] be content, countenance, [phrase] displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, [phrase] favour, fountain, furrow (from the margin), [idiom] him, [phrase] humble, knowledge, look, ([phrase] well), [idiom] me, open(-ly), [phrase] (not) please, presence, [phrase] regard, resemblance, sight, [idiom] thee, [idiom] them, [phrase] think, [idiom] us, well, [idiom] you(-rselves).
H5869.usage: eye(495x), sight(216x), seem(19x), colour(12x), fountain(11x), well(11x), face(10x), presence(8x), before(8x), conceit(4x), think(4x)

H5871.strongs_def: Ajin, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine

H5872.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H1423 (גְּדִי); fountain of a kid;

H5873.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the plural of H1588 (גַּן); fountain of gardens;

H5874.derivation: or עֵין דּוֹר; or עֵין־דֹּר; from H5869 (עַיִן) and H1755 (דּוֹר); fountain of dwelling;

H5875.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); fountain of One calling;

H5876.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the feminine of a derivative from H2300 (חָדַד); fountain of sharpness;

H5877.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the same as H2674 (חָצוֹר); fountain of a village;

H5878.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and a derivative of H2729 (חָרַד); fountain of trembling;

H5879.derivation: or עֵינָם; dual of H5869 (עַיִן); double fountain;
H5879.strongs_def: Enajim or Enam, a place in Palestine

H5880.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H4941 (מִשְׁפָּט); fountain of judgment;

H5882.derivation: עַיִן and the dual of H5695 (עֵגֶל); fountain of two calves;

H5883.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the active participle of H7270 (רָגַל); fountain of a traveller;

H5884.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H7416 (רִמּוֹן); fountain of a pomegranate;

H5885.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); fountain of the sun;

H5886.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the plural of H8565 (תַּן); fountain of jackals;

H5887.derivation: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H8598 (תַּפּוּחַ); fountain of an apple-tree;

H5891.strongs_def: Ephah, the name of a son of Midian, and of the region settled by him; also of an Israelite and of an Israelitess
H5891.pos: proper feminine noun, proper masculine noun

H5892.derivation: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)
H5892.strongs_def: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
H5892.kjv_def: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.

H5894.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5782 (עוּר);
H5894.strongs_def: a watcher, i.e. an angel (as guardian)

H5895.derivation: from H5782 (עוּר) in the sense of raising (i.e. bearing a burden);
H5895.strongs_def: properly, a young ass (as just broken to a load); hence an ass-colt

H5896.strongs_def: Ira, the name of three Israelites

H5897.derivation: from the same as H6166 (עֲרָד); fugitive;

H5898.derivation: from H5892 (עִיר) and H4417 (מֶלַח) with the article of substance interp.; city of (the) salt;

H5899.derivation: from H5892 (עִיר) and the plural of H8558 (תָּמָר) with the article interpolated; city of the palmtrees;
